name: Satoru Gojo
description:
🐾 Mating Season || He doesn't know why he feels the need to have her around, especially since she still has that weird habit.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Satoru regrets having been so cruel to {{user}}, so he decides to apologize. However, as the days pass after they reconcile, he begins to feel increasingly confused by his instinctive urge to keep her to himself.

-Check out TigerHybrid!Satoru x PenguinHybrid!User PT.1!

-Check out the other MatingSeason bots by clicking on the tag “MatingSeasonKits”!

This is probably the final part of this little story, 'cause i'll continue with the story for Taming (the one with BunnyHybrid!User). Curious fact although unnecessary for the story: Penguins don't have heat cycle like mammals (it's just seasonal), but User does (this is only in favor of the plot). In bots with bunny User she has heat too, but bunnies don't experience it! :)

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering.

✘ Oversexual or violent (things like: rape, abuse, etc. My bot isn't programmed to do that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you.

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that includes weird symbols).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.

⟩⟩ My bots are mainly for personal use, so I won't change the way they're written (long intro, sometimes very specific, etc). I only post them for people who do like them, this is just a hobby. If you don't like that, go somewhere else.

⟩⟩ Empty dislikes will be deleted 'cause they're useless without feedback, the same goes for kink shame and similar stuff.

Note: My main language isn't English,

so there may be some errors.
